title: Our Story
headings: Subscribe to our Newsletter and Get 15% off your first order
WE’RE HERE TO BUILD SOMETHING THAT LASTS
“We’re here to create with intention — not just to make things, but to make them matter.”
mainOuterHtml:
WE’RE HERE TO BUILD SOMETHING THAT LASTS

We started this project with a simple idea: to create space for stories, experiences, and perspectives that matter.

Our Mission

“We’re here to create with intention — not just to make things, but to make them matter.”

We believe in thoughtful work, honest expression, and the kind of creativity that leaves a mark. Our mission is to build something that feels personal — something that resonates, lasts, and invites others in.

We’re independent by choice, collaborative by nature, and driven by curiosity. Whether it’s through words, visuals, or shared experiences, we aim to connect people to ideas that matter.

This isn’t about noise. It’s about meaning. We’re here to make space for clarity, depth, and the kind of stories that stay with you.

meet our
founders

Tobi Smith CO-FOUNDER

“We started this with a belief that meaningful work begins with intention. It’s not about doing more — it’s about doing what matters. Every decision we make is rooted in clarity, care, and a commitment to building something that lasts. We’re not chasing trends; we’re shaping something timeless, one thoughtful step at a time. Because when you build with purpose, you build something people can feel — and that feeling is what endures.”

Bethany Oyefeso CO-FOUNDER

“This journey has always been about connection — between people, ideas, and the quiet moments that shape us. I’ve learned that the most powerful work isn’t always loud. It’s the kind that invites reflection, builds trust, and leaves space for others to feel seen. That’s the kind of leadership I believe in — one that listens before it speaks, moves with care, and makes room for meaning to unfold over time.”
